title: Anonymous survey?
excerpt: Hi, I would love to set up a survey that collects data after a meeting, but it needs to be anonymous. All of the recipients would be company personnel but I don’t want the survey to reflect who gave which response. Is th…

posts.author: MaryV (Mary Vogt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I would love to set up a survey that collects data after a meeting, but it needs to be anonymous. All of the recipients would be company personnel but I don’t want the survey to reflect who gave which response. Is that possible?

I was hoping to use Monday’s form to create the survey and collect the data. Please let me know if this is possible. Thank you!

posts.author: WorkFlow (Christopher Jeffers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unless you set automations on the forms they are anonymous by default. You can share the link with clients or employees outside of Monday.com. Hope this answers your question.

See Attached.

form8891×716 26.7 KB

form9893×372 21.2 KB

form10691×666 17.8 KB

form111056×769 24.8 KB

posts.author: MaryV (Mary Vogt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Christopher,

Thank you! That is awesome and yes, that answers my question.

Best regards,

Mary
